chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 760 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 27.11.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the applicant nor any intimation received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. The instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is pending on the file of this Court since, 2024 without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the applicant and his Counsel prima facie indicates either the purpose of filing instant application has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. According, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge ARBROHI/PS
